title: Global youth party-slang river mouths: East and Southeast Asia
criterion: A useful river mouth must produce a dense exact-search stream of executable games, rules, host tips, question cards, apps, collections, or repeat creators. Semantic similarity to Chinese 局头 alone is insufficient.

density_scale.very_high: Exact query repeatedly surfaces multiple independent collections, rules, apps or creator-style posts.
density_scale.high: Strong multi-source stream of executable content.
density_scale.medium: Real and repeatable content exists, but density is smaller or mixed.
density_scale.low: Mostly definitions, cultural explanation, people or unrelated content.
density_scale.noisy: Target content exists but is overwhelmed by another intent or unsafe SEO pollution.

status_scale.verified: The exact term or combination is already a usable content-collection river mouth.
status_scale.candidate: Native term is real but requires signed-in platform validation or stronger qualifiers.
status_scale.dead_end: Meaning is relevant but exact search does not lead to the target content river.
status_scale.risk: Youth term or query exists but has strong semantic, reputational, adult or gambling contamination.

true_role_like_bridges.assessment: Closest functional role across the six markets, but only medium public search yield.
Strong shared-cup and round-control role in Southern drinking culture, but low tutorial density.

best_content_river_mouths: 幹事必見 飲み会ゲーム
เกมวงเหล้า

items.functional_gloss: Drinking-party games; the strongest Japanese executable-content entry.
exact_queries: 飲み会ゲーム 盛り上がる
飲み会ゲーム 大人数
飲み会ゲーム 道具なし
飲み会ゲーム アプリ
飲み会ゲーム 大学生

evidence.note: Portal built around more than ten drinking games.
2026 collection of 24 games plus organizer preparation.
Eight-game Japanese drinking-party app with 5K+ downloads.

items.caution: Alcohol context; retain a parallel non-alcohol party-game branch for minors.

items.term: 幹事必見 + 飲み会ゲーム
items.functional_gloss: Organizer-must-see title wrapper; the closest Japanese packaging to 局头手册.
exact_queries: 幹事必見 飲み会ゲーム
幹事必見 宴会ゲーム
幹事 ゲーム 進行
幹事 コツ 盛り上げ

evidence.note: Uses 幹事さん必見 and collects user-shared drinking games.
2026 organizer-must-see game content.
Eighteen banquet games framed for organizers.

items.caution: 幹事 alone is broad and formal; keep the game or party qualifier.

protocol: Run the exact query and label the first 20 to 50 results.
Measure the share containing playable rules, prompts, cards or host techniques.
Count independent creators, not duplicate SEO pages.
Look for at least three installments from one creator or a repeated series format.
Extract new role terms from native captions and comments.
Downgrade role terms that return only definitions, personalities or cultural explanation.
